statement: Centralized date logic — Date calculations should live in shared helpers, not scattered across cards/islands/timeline components. — date.helpers.ts, timelineHelpers.ts, TaskEditor date controls.
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: User sees consistent date behavior everywhere.
